# Type Alias: MeasureType

> **MeasureType** = keyof *typeof* [`measureTypeMap`](../../../../variables/measureTypeMap.md)

Defined in: [src/types/receipt/item.type.ts:122](https://github.com/WEBzaytsev/yookassa-ts-sdk/blob/a630c10d01fabd8cdfaf36f2b07476b4a58137e4/src/types/receipt/item.type.ts#L122)
